title: sphaeranthus peduncularis
intro: Sphaeranthus peduncularis, also known as the African featherbush or white button, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, with its medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus peduncularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Sphaeranthus peduncularis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and traditional medicine.
